locator.quote: of runner, regardless of obs, regardless of agent.

text: In the v2 stack the arb_spread is always 20 ticks during training and eval, regardless of runner, regardless of obs, regardless of agent — the DiscreteActionShim hard-codes it.

locator.quote: arb_spread for a 1.20 favourite vs a 12.0 long-shot — the

text: No individual agent will ever pick a different arb_spread for a 1.20 favourite vs a 12.0 long-shot — the architecture forbids it.
The only per-agent variation is a global gene arb_spread_scale ∈ [0.5, 2.0] applied as a multiplier, so agents get arb_ticks ∈ [10, 25] cohort-wide.

locator.quote: random-init noise; the 76 % aggregate force-close rate is mostly

text: Caveat: gen-0 agents on a freshly-reset registry are random-init noise; the 76% aggregate force-close rate is mostly aggressives fired anywhere with the passive at +20 ticks rarely filling.
